infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MOBO needs your location to find nearby drivers and show your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: MOBO needs your location in the background to track your ride.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MOBO needs your location to provide ride services.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MOBO needs camera access to update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MOBO needs photo library access to update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MOBO needs microphone access for in-app communication.
